input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.3.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.3.3.2
            TITLE: applicability

            CONTENT:
            rule F.3.3.2: Applicability
F.3.3.2 Applicability 
Non Structural Tubing is ignored when assessing compliance to any rule

final_answer: Applicability Non Structural Tubing is ignored when assessing compliance to any rule
